title: Steve Collins (rugby league)
extract: Steve Collins (born 9 April 1974) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for Canberra Raiders, Parramatta Eels, Featherstone Rovers, Gateshead Thunder and Hull FC during 2000s Super League V, as a fullback, wing, or centre.
